name: High Heels
overview:
Royal glamour of fashion meets the ambitions of fresh talent. Get ready for a storm of style, drama, and fierce competition!

India’s legendary fashion icon introduces a new face, bringing forward a designer with fresh ideas. Will their collaboration spark a revolution in the industry, or will it all collapse like a house of cards?

Ambitions ignite, unexpected friendships blossom, and a sharp glimpse into the world of fashion unfolds.

trailers.title: Fashion Web Series | High Heels | Official Trailer | ft. Tanya Sharma, Sakshi Shivdasani
